response.overview: Arathi is a powerful documentary that explores the multifaceted life of Sivakami IAS – a trailblazing bureaucrat, bold political voice, and acclaimed Tamil writer. This film delves into her groundbreaking journey as one of the first Dalit women to join the Indian Administrative Service, her transition into politics as a fierce advocate for social justice, and her impactful contributions to Tamil literature.
response.title: Arathi (அறத்தீ )
